sema_checking_logic: Implicit scalar promotion: when binary op `T + vec<T,N>` is evaluated, scalar `T` is promoted to `vec<T,N>` with identity splat. Vector-vector ops require identical element count `N`.
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: can't convert between vector values of different size ('float3' and 'float4')

sema_checking_logic: Pointer to address space A (`device`, `constant`, `threadgroup`, `thread`) can only be implicitly cast to generic/default address space if supported (`__HAVE_GENERIC_ADDRESS_SPACE__`). Explicit cast required between distinct non-generic spaces. Assignment from `constant` to `thread` pointer is illegal.
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: assigning to 'float *' from incompatible type 'constant float *'

sema_checking_logic: Function marked with `[[kernel]]` (`kernel void`) MUST return `void`. Non-void return type triggers syntax/semantic rejection.

All pointer parameters (`device T*`, `constant T*`, `threadgroup T*`) to a `[[kernel]]` function MUST have an explicit resource attribute: `[[buffer(N)]]`, `[[texture(N)]]`, `[[sampler(N)]]`, or `[[stage_in]]`.
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: kernel parameter 'buf' requires a buffer attribute
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Check `MetalBufferIndexAttr` presence on all `ParmVarDecl` with pointer type

target_syntax_or_type: Texture and buffer access rights checking
sema_checking_logic: Texture/buffer parameter qualified with `access::read`, `access::write`, `access::read_write`, or `access::sample` restrict method calls. Calling `.write()` on `access::read` texture triggers semantic error.
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: no member named 'write' in 'metal::texture2d<float, metal::access::read>'
apple_clang_impl_point: Overload resolution overload candidate filtering via template trait `access`
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Strict template instantiation checks based on `access::*` type parameters

sema_checking_logic: Attribute `[[buffer(N)]]`, `[[texture(N)]]`, `[[sampler(N)]]` validates that `N` is an integer literal within device maximum limits (`N < 31` for buffer, `N < 128` for texture, `N < 16` for sampler).
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: buffer index '35' exceeds maximum allowed index '30'
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Extract `IntegerLiteral` value from attribute and check against `TargetInfo` limits

target_syntax_or_type: Subgroup / SIMD group matrix type verification
sema_checking_logic: Methods of `simdgroup_matrix<T,C,R>` require element type `T` to be `half`, `float`, or `bfloat`. Matrix dimensions must exactly be `8x8` (`C==8 && R==8`).
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: invalid element type 'int' for simdgroup_matrix
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Enforce strict static assertions inside MSL C++ template definitions

target_syntax_or_type: Atomic type address space scope validation
sema_checking_logic: Type `atomic<T>` (and `atomic_uint*`) must reside in address space `device` (`as1`) or `threadgroup` (`as3`). Declaring local `thread atomic<int> x;` inside function is rejected.
error_diagnostic_or_behavior: error: atomic variables must be in device or threadgroup address space
